response.justification: Candidate has well over a decade of full-stack experience, including current work on TypeScript/Node.js product code plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly maps to the role's primary stack and the AI agent development requirement. Track record spans React frontends, Node backends, MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes, multiple languages (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang), and a strong TDD/craftsmanship orientation evidenced by talks, workshops, and open-source test tooling.
strengths: Current TypeScript/Node.js + React + MongoDB experience matches primary stack
Hands-on AI agent / MCP infrastructure work — rare and directly requested
Deep craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based, workshops, open-source test libraries
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience called out in the resume
Kotlin not mentioned (Java only) for the secondary backend stack
Location (Lagos, Nigeria) may create timezone/relocation considerations for a Berlin-oriented org
